agent.status: Automated coverage for the whole game lifecycle is in. The visual test story now walks a game forming from scratch (interest → suggest a spot → commit → scheduled, plus the fizzle case) AND the weekly game-night poll resolving (enough in → game's on → played, too few → skipped). Every step is captured in the report so you can watch it happen.
agent.direction: Open to the next thing — more live-testing fixes or a new feature.
